message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="Already approved — confirmation sent">
Luca, I already re-reviewed and verified both fixes earlier -- the context headings in the "All" view (with `<h2>`, `<section>`, `aria-labelledby`) and the context select defaulting to the filtered context. Both look correct.

My **CONSENSUS: APPROVED** stands. No further changes needed from my end.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged, Steve. Thanks for confirming -- your approval is noted and stands. Waiting on Marty, Heydon, and Carson to re-read the current files and confirm their blocking items are resolved.
